    Namespace: Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.Cad
    Assembly: Aspose.CAD.dll
    Syntax
    [ComVisible(false)]
public class DxfImage : CadImage, IDisposable, IObjectWithBounds

    Constructors

    Name Description
    DxfImage(CadAcadVersion)

    Initializes a new instance of the DxfImage class.

    Methods

    Name Description
    AddEntity(CadBaseEntity)

    Adds entity.
    AddObject(CadBaseObject)

    Adds enity.
    AssignHandle(CadBase)

    Assigns next available object handle.
    NextAvailableHandle()

    Gets next available object handle
    ReleaseContents()

    Releases the contents of image - all entities, objects, etc, so it won't hold any references so memory could be collected

    Removes entity.
